PLF Road Map
!
OK so now I just want to cover the what of Product Launch Formula, just a quick
roadmap of the course and what you'll learn and where within Product Launch Formula.
This is a big program because there's only one way I know how to teach, and that's to
give you everything. It is a lot, there's a lot here but just remember, one of my favorite
things -- you're going to hear me say this a lot -- it's all about the baby steps. It's about
taking steps, moving forward in the direction you're going to. No one jumps to a million
dollar launch overnight, it just doesn't happen. You start off with small successes and
you build them.
It's just like a baby, they take that first step and they fall down, but they get up and try
to take another attempt, and they fall down. But eventually they put a couple steps
together and sooner or later they're walking. Every baby learns to walk and if you just
take the baby steps and just keep moving forward in this program, you'll have that
same experience. It will work for you.
You don't need to do it all, you don't need to do every single type of launch, you don't
have to do every single piece. The model is so powerful that you can get 20% of it right
and you're still going to win. You don't have to get it all right or all perfect, I make
mistakes in every single launch I do. But it doesn't matter because the model is so
redundant, and so powerful, and so strong, that it's going to end up working for you.
Let's walk through the modules. Module 1 is basically the core strategies and
tactics. What I cover in here is what makes the whole thing tick, what makes Product
Launch Formula work. If you only go through this one module, then you win and you
win forever. You will change your results forever. You'll need to do the core work in here
and I've got some actual exercises in here but you will use them in all of your launches
going forward. So the core work that you're doing in module 1 works for all your
launches, no matter whether they're seed launches or JV launches or quick launches or
internal launch, doesn't matter. The core work is going to continue to work for you as
you move forward.
And the core exercises, you might change businesses, you might radically change your
business model, but you can still go back to the work or exercise that you did in
module. Go through it all again and you're going to be set up for a launch all over
again. This is where you learn to connect with your market to create great offers and a
great pre-launch, and really develop the core ingredients of your launch. So module
one, that sounded pretty cool right? Pretty big right?
Module 2 we take it to the next step. We take the work you did in module 1
and we start to develop your launch theme and your launch story. We'll go
deep into what I call the PS Path, which is how you deliver huge value and still make
the sale. It's how you avoid giving away the farm, giving away everything and giving

away just the right amount of money, right amount of content so it leads into the sale
and then you make the money. So it's a key piece.
Also in module 2, I'll cover the business launch formula and a lot of the tools that we
use within launches. So module 1 and module 2 are a lot of the core strategy and
tactics again, you come out of that and then work you do in those two modules will set
you up going forward. Now from there on out is where we actually take it and start to
drop it into your launches. In module 3, we cover the seed launch and the quick launch.
Now the seed launch is great if you have no list and no product. It's a
beautiful thing because you basically, you get paid to create your product.
I love it. That's how I did my first launch for when I first rolled out Product
Launch Formula. When I first started teaching product launches, I did it as a seed
launch. I started off with six sales and it grew up into this huge business that I've got
today, it's been amazing. The quick launch is great if you've already got a
business and an offer, but you just want a quick pop of money. This is the
easiest and quickest launch - that's the quick launch. I did it once to pay my taxes, I did
it once to finish my basement - it’s a great way to bring in money quick.
One thing I forgot to mention about that seed launch is it's great to get started if you
have no list and no product. But say you already have an existing business and you
want to come out with a new product, but you just can't seem to get yourself to put in
the time to create the product - it’s great for that too.
Now module 4, the big focus of module 4 is on the internal launch. The internal launch
is basically the classic sideways sales letter launch with the three pieces of content, plus
the sales letter/video, but it's just a launch to your existing list. I love internal launches,
they're the most elegant launches in my opinion. They're fun to do, you have complete
control over every aspect, it's fantastic. It's a logical next step after you do the seed
launch to go to do an internal launch. We also go deep into creating prelaunch content
in module 4 and the great thing about this module is this where we start to get into
really high leverage because those internal launches are high leverage launches.
And also I'll go deep into some of the launch list, how you create a launch list,
how you manage the launch list - we’ll go deep into launch list secrets in module 4.
Now module 5, which is the best module ever. I love this module because this is where
I go deep into breaking down prelaunch content videos. This is probably the best
teaching I have ever done. I'll actually walk you through prelaunch videos from
some of my students and you get to actually see their videos, and then I'll stop the
videos and I say, "Oh look at what they did here, this is awesome. This is really great,
this is where you - look at how he established authority here."
"Look at this is reciprocity here, look how he did this." "Oh he missed this, this is
where he screwed up here," it's fantastic. It’s just real world stuff. You're going to love
it. I'm also going to cover the book launch in module 5. Module 6, well it might even be
better than module 5 because it's all about creating sales videos. I do the same thing
that I did back in module 5 where I'll actually take real sales videos and I'll break them

-- 3 of 5 --

down for you. I will do a stop action where we'll go through and we'll talk about each
piece and what exactly is happening and how the structure goes together. It's fantastic.
Plus in module 6, I'm going to cover JV launches. That's where you get other
people mailing about your launch, and these are the highest leverage launches there
are. This is like an analogy I love - when you've got a roaring fire going and it's pouring
gasoline on that fire. That's what JV launches do. And then module 7, which I didn't
even tell you about, that's a complete bonus module and module 7's all about the
evergreen launch. And an evergreen launch is basically once you've done work and
created that internal launch or that JV launch, then you can build a system so that
every time a new lead comes into your business, they end up going through your
evergreen launch.
Basically you have the power of PLF, but you have it going all year round for you
every time you get new leads. The beautiful thing about evergreen is you get to
reuse the material from your other launches. This is really advanced stuff, not
everyone's going to do this, not everyone's going to get there with the evergreen
launches but that bonus module's all about evergreen. Basically the layout is we start
simple but big with important core work that's going to carry through all of the
modules, and all of your launches, and all of your work.
And then we added more details after you get that core in place. Plus I've got plenty of
other bonuses and goodies. You already have access to the Launch Your List 2.0 course.
Around module 5 or 6, we'll release the Product Creation course for you so you'll have
that in place as well.
The one thing I've learned as I went through this how to avoid overwhelming people
with too much at once. That's why we've really carefully sequenced this out - we start
with the core strategy and then we add in more as you go forward.
If you're just starting out, module 1 and 2 are absolutely critical for you, and then
you're going to really go after that seed launch in module 3. If you already have a
business, then module 1 and 2 will probably give you an entirely new way to look at
your business that's going to translate into: more money, more growth, better
positioning, and list growth. Then you may possibly want to look at a quick launch in
module 3, because then you can make a bunch of money back real quick.
Or you might just want to focus on the internal launch. Then of course the JV launch is
just going to blow things up really big for you, and the evergreen launch is really
awesome if you end up putting that in place.
So remember it's about baby steps, you don't have to watch every single video. I mean
it would be awesome if you did but you don't have to do every exercise. But get in
there, put in the work and get this right. You don't have to get everything right, you
just have to get that 20% right and it will kill it for you.
